title: Mondo disease-ontology CC-BY overlay (xrefs + labels)
context: The CC0 core graph uses Mondo CURIEs for disease normalization but does not include the full Mondo ontology label/xref enrichment, which is CC-BY-4.0 licensed. A segregated CC-BY overlay can provide richer disease labels, synonyms, and cross-references (to OMIM, DOID, etc.) without contaminating the CC0 core. This is an unscheduled backlog item for after M4.
objective: Produce a CC-BY-4.0 Mondo disease-ontology overlay providing disease labels, synonyms, and cross-references for disease nodes in the CC0 core, packaged as a separate overlay dataset with its own license manifest.
acceptanceCriteria: Mondo disease labels, synonyms, and xrefs are extracted for disease entities present in the CC0 core graph.
Overlay is packaged separately from the CC0 core and carries a CC-BY-4.0 license manifest.
Every overlay entry carries provenance: source=Mondo, version, license=CC-BY-4.0.
Mondo's allowlist entry is approved before ingestion.
A data README explains the overlay scope and how to combine it with the CC0 core.
output: data/overlays/mondo/ directory with the CC-BY-4.0 Mondo disease label/xref overlay dataset and license manifest, committed via PR.
